task_completion.description: Verify the agent has logged into the medical records system as an administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dashboard or home screen is visible, and the logged-in user is indicated as 'admin' or administrator.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened the pending 'Complete Blood Count (CBC)' order for patient Jannette Charley.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A lab order entry or results screen displaying the patient name 'Jannette Charley' (DOB: 1965-02-14) and the order name 'Complete Blood Count' or 'CBC'.

task_completion.description: Verify the WBC and RBC values are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Input fields for White Blood Cells (WBC) showing a value of 6.8 and Red Blood Cells (RBC) showing a value of 4.22.

task_completion.description: Verify the Hemoglobin and Hematocrit values are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Input fields for Hemoglobin showing a value of 11.8 and Hematocrit showing a value of 35.4.

task_completion.description: Verify the Platelet Count value is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An input field for Platelet Count showing a value of 245.

task_completion.description: Verify the order status is set to 'Final' and the results are saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A status dropdown or indicator showing 'Final' and evidence of saving, such as a 'Save' button being clicked, a success confirmation message, or the completed order view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the graphical user interface of the medical records system to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the EMR/Lab system interface, rather than a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is using the genuine medical application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface appears to be a fully featured web application with proper navigation menus and styling, not a mocked text file or basic HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing SQL commands, curl requests, or Python scripts to submit the lab results directly to the backend.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Jannette Charley (DOB: 1965-02-14). Order: Complete Blood Count (CBC). Target values (with acceptable tolerances): WBC 6.8 (±0.5), RBC 4.22 (±0.3), Hemoglobin 11.8 (±0.5), Hematocrit 35.4 (±1.0), Platelet Count 245 (±10). The final status must be explicitly set to 'Final'.
